LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT WOLDEMARIAM GHEBGREYESUS MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWS PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ON FEBRUARY 26, 2006 AT 706 VIENNA STREET. DEFENDANT CLAIMS HE WAS NOT LIVING AT 706 VIENNA STREET AS OF MARCH 6, 2006. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILED TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 473.5. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WOLDEMARIAM GHEBGREYESUS MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Woldemariam Ghebreyesus, 699-5171 or 259-1191 deft & moving party in propria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court allowed oral argument since defendant complied with the tentative ruling rule, indicating that he had given notice to the other side yesterday. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWS PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ON FEBRUARY 26, 2006 AT 706 VIENNA STREET. DEFENDANT CLAIMS HE WAS NOT LIVING AT 706 VIENNA STREET AS OF MARCH 6, 2006. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILED TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 473.5. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/JKS/AY) JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761
